voice.tone: Operational and direct. Speaks to SREs and platform engineers.
voice.errors: Diagnostic and precise. Include timestamps, request IDs, and suggested remediation. Link to runbooks.
voice.loading: Chart skeleton placeholders with axis lines. Metric cards show pulsing number placeholders. Log lines stream in progressively.
voice.empty_states: Operational calm. No data means no incidents — show a green status indicator and guide users to configure their first data source.
